headline: Insulet Device Correction Tests Omnipod 5 Quality And Growth Story
summary: Insulet (NasdaqGS:PODD) initiated a voluntary Medical Device Correction for certain Omnipod 5 Pods after identifying a manufacturing issue that can lead to insulin under delivery. The issue is linked to serious adverse health events, including diabetic ketoacidosis and hospitalizations, and has been reported to regulators. The company is implementing corrective measures and manufacturing process changes to address affected lots and reduce future risk. Insulet focuses on insulin delivery...
